source_jobs.title: VP Engineering
source_jobs.description:
WHY DELPHI? 

Delphi is building the network of digital minds.

For the first time, anyone can create an interactive version of themselves: a living profile that talks, teaches, and answers questions in your voice, with your perspective and judgment, around the clock. The internet gave us static profiles and endless feeds. We're building something alive. People won't just read about you, they'll experience how you think.

This is the consumer shift we're betting on. Today it's thousands of the world's most brilliant minds. Next it's everyone: every thought leader, expert, and professional with a digital mind that scales their wisdom to anyone, anywhere. A new social layer where knowledge is abundant, personalized, and discoverable.

We are trusted and loved by thousands of the world’s most brilliant minds. We have tripled revenue, users, and Delphi interactions in the past 6 months - all organically through word of mouth. We plan to accelerate even further from here.

Delphi’s investors include Sequoia Capital, Founders Fund, Abstract Ventures, Michael Ovitz, Gokul Rajaram, Olivia Wilde, and dozens of founders from Lyft, Zoom, Doordash, and many more. Our team includes founders with successful exits and builders from Apple, Spotify, Substack and more.

Learn more about Delphi and this position by calling the CEO’s digital mind here https://www.delphi.ai/dara/call


THE ROLE

As VP of Engineering, you will own and scale Delphi’s engineering organization as we move into our next phase of exponential growth. You’ll set the technical vision, build high-performance teams, and partner closely with product, design, and leadership to to support the next phase of Delphi.

This is a role for someone who wants to help shape the future of human connection, scale wisdom for billions, and build something that will outlast us all.


WHAT YOU’LL DO

 - Define and execute on the technical vision and architecture for systems serving millions of digital minds.

 - Build and lead the engineering organization to a standard of excellence - establish technical precision practices and foster ownership-driven culture where engineers proactively solve problems.

 - Drive engineering execution - consistently ship high-quality systems quickly, balancing speed and durability.

 - Partner cross-functionally with product, design, and leadership to align strategy and deliver ambitious roadmaps.

 - Raise the bar: mentor leaders, establish a world class engineering culture, and ensure Delphi remains a magnet for top talent.


WHAT YOU BRING

 - 7+ years of engineering experience, with 2+ years leading teams of 10+ engineers in a hyper-growth, high-expectation environment.

 - A proven track record of building teams and shipping large-scale, high-impact systems.

 - Executive communication skills: can translate between technical and non-technical audiences.

 - First-principles thinker, comfortable navigating ambiguity and inventing new playbooks.

 - Ability to build an ownership-driven engineering culture where teams consistently exceed expectations, beat deadlines, and take complete responsibility for their domains.


WHY YOU'LL LOVE IT HERE

We work on hard problems. Our team is full of former founders, and entrepreneurial individuals who are taking on immense initiatives.

We push each other. Work from our beautiful Jackson Square office in San Francisco, surrounded by peers pushing to do their best work.

Benefits

 - Unlimited Learning Stipend: Whether it’s books, courses, or conferences, we want to support your growth and development. The more you learn and improve your craft the more effective we will be together.

 - Health, Dental, Vision: Comprehensive coverage to keep to take care of your health.

 - 401k covered by Human Interest.

 - Housing Stipend.

 - Relocation support to SF (as needed)

If you’re looking for just a job, Delphi isn’t the right fit. But if you want to shape the future of human connection, scale wisdom for billions, and build

source_jobs.title: Full Stack (Product) Engineer
source_jobs.description:
WHY DELPHI? 

Delphi is building the network of digital minds.

For the first time, anyone can create an interactive version of themselves: a living profile that talks, teaches, and answers questions in your voice, with your perspective and judgment, around the clock. The internet gave us static profiles and endless feeds. We're building something alive. People won't just read about you, they'll experience how you think.

This is the consumer shift we're betting on. Today it's thousands of the world's most brilliant minds. Next it's everyone: every thought leader, expert, and professional with a digital mind that scales their wisdom to anyone, anywhere. A new social layer where knowledge is abundant, personalized, and discoverable.

We are trusted and loved by thousands of the world’s most brilliant minds. We have tripled revenue, users, and Delphi interactions in the past 6 months - all organically through word of mouth. We plan to accelerate even further from here.

Delphi’s investors include Sequoia Capital, Founders Fund, Abstract Ventures, Michael Ovitz, Gokul Rajaram, Olivia Wilde, and dozens of founders from Lyft, Zoom, Doordash, and many more. Our team includes founders with successful exits and builders from Apple, Spotify, Substack and more.

Learn more about Delphi and this position by calling the CEO’s digital mind here https://www.delphi.ai/dara/call


THE ROLE

As our Full Stack (Product) Engineer, you will own end-to-end product initiatives that define how creators build and share their digital minds while crafting seamless experiences for consumers who discover and interact with them. You'll architect and ship the foundational systems powering our Mind Studio, our interaction experiences, and our consumer platform across our entire Next.js/Python/AWS stack.


WHAT YOU'LL DO

Own Product Initiatives: drive digital mind studio creator tools, text/voice/video interaction experiences, and consumer discovery platforms from concept to launch.

Architect Full Stack Systems: design scalable Next.js/Python/AWS solutions with durable data models and efficient database structures that support rapid growth and millions of interactions.

Cross-Domain Excellence: seamlessly navigate frontend React development, backend architecture, database optimization, and cloud infrastructure deployment.


WHAT YOU BRING

 - Proven ability to build products end-to-end with a track record of taking massive initiatives from concept to launch.

 - Deep proficiency in TypeScript/Next.js and Python with hands-on experience in our core technology stack.

 - Strong understanding of SQL, database design, cloud infrastructure, and containerization for scalable systems.

 - Proven experience with systems architecture and API design (crisp, predictable, versioned), queues, caching, background tasks, resilience, and self-healing patterns.

 - Can-do attitude with intense curiosity about technology and the ability to adapt quickly in our fast-moving environment.

 - Experience with LLMs via API integration, empathy for users, and effective communication skills that ensure delivery matches the idea.

 - Bonus: prompt engineering experience and deep LLM optimization knowledge.


WHY YOU'LL LOVE IT HERE

We work on hard problems. Our team is full of former founders, and entrepreneurial individuals who are taking on immense initiatives.

We push each other. Work from our beautiful Jackson Square office in San Francisco, surrounded by peers pushing to do their best work.

Benefits

 - Unlimited Learning Stipend: Whether it’s books, courses, or conferences, we want to support your growth and development. The more you learn and improve your craft the more effective we will be together.

 - Health, Dental, Vision: Comprehensive coverage to keep to take care of your health.

 - 401k covered by Human Interest.

 - Housing Stipend.

 - Relocation support to SF (as needed)

source_jobs.title: Design Engineer
source_jobs.description:
WHY DELPHI? 

Delphi is building the network of digital minds.

For the first time, anyone can create an interactive version of themselves: a living profile that talks, teaches, and answers questions in your voice, with your perspective and judgment, around the clock. The internet gave us static profiles and endless feeds. We're building something alive. People won't just read about you, they'll experience how you think.

This is the consumer shift we're betting on. Today it's thousands of the world's most brilliant minds. Next it's everyone: every thought leader, expert, and professional with a digital mind that scales their wisdom to anyone, anywhere. A new social layer where knowledge is abundant, personalized, and discoverable.

We are trusted and loved by thousands of the world’s most brilliant minds. We have tripled revenue, users, and Delphi interactions in the past 6 months - all organically through word of mouth. We plan to accelerate even further from here.

Delphi’s investors include Sequoia Capital, Founders Fund, Abstract Ventures, Michael Ovitz, Gokul Rajaram, Olivia Wilde, and dozens of founders from Lyft, Zoom, Doordash, and many more. Our team includes founders with successful exits and builders from Apple, Spotify, Substack and more.

Learn more about Delphi and this position by calling the CEO’s digital mind here https://www.delphi.ai/dara/call


WHO YOU ARE

 - Code-first builder with exceptional design taste - You're a front-end engineer who happens to have a great eye for design. You can debate the merits of Server Components vs Client Components as easily as you can critique visual hierarchy.

 - Master of the modern web stack - React, Next.js, TypeScript, and Tailwind aren't just tools you use—they're tools you've mastered. You know the performance implications of your choices and write code that's both beautiful and fast.

 - Obsessive about craft and details - You notice when animations feel off by 50ms, when a loading state causes layout shift, or when a color doesn't meet WCAG standards. You fix these things without being asked.

 - Full-stack front-end engineer - Comfortable working across the entire front-end stack, from API integration and state management to responsive layouts and micro-interactions. Bonus if you can jump into Python backends when needed.

 - Owner, not executor - You prototype quickly, gather feedback, iterate fast, and ship confidently. You take features from zero to production and own the outcomes.

 - Product-minded engineer - You push back on designs that don't serve users, suggest improvements to the product direction, and think deeply about user flows. You build with empathy and intention.

 - Comfortable in ambiguity - You thrive when the problem space is undefined. You're energized by questions like "how should people discover Delphi's?" rather than paralyzed by them.


WHAT YOU'LL DO

 - Build the core interfaces of Delphi Studio - Own and ship the primary user-facing features: creation flows, customization tools, and interaction patterns. You'll write the React components, build the APIs integrations, and polish every detail.

 - Create a discovery platform for digital minds - Design and implement the browsing experience, search functionality, filtering systems, and recommendation interfaces. Make exploring thousands of AI personas feel effortless and delightful.

 - Architect scalable front-end systems - Build reusable component libraries, establish patterns for state management, optimize bundle sizes, and ensure the app performs beautifully at scale.

 - Translate AI complexity into simple UX - Work directly with product and backend engineers to understand AI capabilities, then build interfaces that expose the power while hiding the complexity.

 - Set the standard for quality - Your code will be the example others follow. Write clean TypeScript, build accessible components, implement smooth animations, and establish the bar for what "production-ready" means.

 - Co

source_jobs.title: Product Designer
source_jobs.description:
WHY DELPHI? 

Delphi is building the network of digital minds.

For the first time, anyone can create an interactive version of themselves: a living profile that talks, teaches, and answers questions in your voice, with your perspective and judgment, around the clock. The internet gave us static profiles and endless feeds. We're building something alive. People won't just read about you, they'll experience how you think.

This is the consumer shift we're betting on. Today it's thousands of the world's most brilliant minds. Next it's everyone: every thought leader, expert, and professional with a digital mind that scales their wisdom to anyone, anywhere. A new social layer where knowledge is abundant, personalized, and discoverable.

We are trusted and loved by thousands of the world’s most brilliant minds. We have tripled revenue, users, and Delphi interactions in the past 6 months - all organically through word of mouth. We plan to accelerate even further from here.

Delphi’s investors include Sequoia Capital, Founders Fund, Abstract Ventures, Michael Ovitz, Gokul Rajaram, Olivia Wilde, and dozens of founders from Lyft, Zoom, Doordash, and many more. Our team includes founders with successful exits and builders from Apple, Spotify, Substack and more.

Learn more about Delphi and this position by calling the CEO’s digital mind here https://www.delphi.ai/dara/call


WHAT YOU'LL DO

 - Build for consumer - requiring attention to detail and obsession over user journeys.

 - Design end-to-end user experiences for interacting with digital minds—from conversation flows to content upload, from onboarding to complex configuration interfaces

 - Build design systems and interaction patterns that scale across web and mobile

 - Prototype rapidly in code (Figma + React) to validate ideas and ship your own designs to production

 - Think in flows and systems - mapping complex user journeys while understanding state, context, and edge cases

 - Own the details that make experiences feel alive: interaction timing, loading states, error handling, and micro-moments

 - Bridge design and engineering by translating technical constraints into elegant user experiences

 - Define what we should build based on user insights, technical feasibility, and business impact


WHO YOU ARE

 - Systems thinker: You see patterns across features and build reusable solutions. 4+ years designing digital products with strong understanding of design systems and component architecture.

 - Deeply product-minded: You understand how things should work, not just how they look. You think about user psychology, technical constraints, and information architecture - then make it beautiful.

 - Consumer Experiences: understanding of incentives, game mechanics, virality, and retention loops.

 - Technically fluent: Comfortable with modern frameworks. You can prototype in code and speak fluently with engineers.

 - Craft-driven with pragmatism: Your portfolio shows attention to interaction design, typography, and visual polish—but also smart decisions about when to ship fast versus when to perfect details.

 - Builder mentality: You prototype quickly, test assumptions, and iterate based on real usage. Comfort with ambiguity and defining what needs to exist.

 - Clear communicator: You articulate design decisions with reasoning, push back thoughtfully, and align cross-functional teams around a shared vision.


WHY YOU'LL LOVE IT HERE

We work on hard problems. Our team is full of former founders, and entrepreneurial individuals who are taking on immense initiatives.

We push each other. Work from our beautiful Jackson Square office in San Francisco, surrounded by peers pushing to do their best work.

source_jobs.title: Forward Deployed Engineer
source_jobs.description:
WHY DELPHI? 

Delphi is building the network of digital minds.

For the first time, anyone can create an interactive version of themselves: a living profile that talks, teaches, and answers questions in your voice, with your perspective and judgment, around the clock. The internet gave us static profiles and endless feeds. We're building something alive. People won't just read about you, they'll experience how you think.

This is the consumer shift we're betting on. Today it's thousands of the world's most brilliant minds. Next it's everyone: every thought leader, expert, and professional with a digital mind that scales their wisdom to anyone, anywhere. A new social layer where knowledge is abundant, personalized, and discoverable.

We are trusted and loved by thousands of the world’s most brilliant minds. We have tripled revenue, users, and Delphi interactions in the past 6 months - all organically through word of mouth. We plan to accelerate even further from here.

Delphi’s investors include Sequoia Capital, Founders Fund, Abstract Ventures, Michael Ovitz, Gokul Rajaram, Olivia Wilde, and dozens of founders from Lyft, Zoom, Doordash, and many more. Our team includes founders with successful exits and builders from Apple, Spotify, Substack and more.

Learn more about Delphi and this position by calling the CEO’s digital mind here https://www.delphi.ai/dara/call

What you'll do

 - Own everything revenue-facing at Delphi, end to end. You're the engineer who makes our highest-value customers successful.

 - Build, ship, and maintain enterprise features: embeds, SSO, API integrations, SMS/WhatsApp (Twilio), Slack, and CRM connectors (HubSpot, Salesforce, Kit).

 - Act as the translation layer between engineering and the paid/enterprise side of the business. Know when to pull others in and when to just fix it yourself.

 - Build net-new features for our enterprise arm, including API capabilities, embedding infrastructure, and monetization tooling.

Who you are

 - Senior full stack engineer with 3+ years of experience. You've built and shipped real products, not just features inside a big org.

 - Equally comfortable in TypeScript/React and backend systems. You can move across the stack without waiting for someone else.

 - You think like a founder. You see a customer problem and your instinct is to solve it, not file a ticket. Former technical founders are a great fit.

 - Customer-facing ability is a strong plus. You don't need to run sales calls, but you're not afraid to hop on one with a high-profile client when needed.

 - Strong product judgment. You can evaluate 10 customer requests and know which 2 actually matter.


WHY YOU'LL LOVE IT HERE

We work on hard problems. Our team is full of former founders, and entrepreneurial individuals who are taking on immense initiatives.

We push each other. Work from our beautiful Jackson Square office in San Francisco, surrounded by peers pushing to do their best work.

Benefits

 - Unlimited Learning Stipend: Whether it’s books, courses, or conferences, we want to support your growth and development. The more you learn and improve your craft the more effective we will be together.

 - Health, Dental, Vision: Comprehensive coverage to keep to take care of your health.

 - 401k covered by Human Interest.

 - Housing Stipend.

 - Relocation support to SF (as needed)

If you’re looking for just a job, Delphi isn’t the right fit. But if you want to shape the future of human connection, scale wisdom for billions, and build something that will outlast us all - you’ll feel at home here.

source_jobs.title: Growth Marketer
source_jobs.description:
WHY DELPHI? 

Delphi is building the network of digital minds.

For the first time, anyone can create an interactive version of themselves: a living profile that talks, teaches, and answers questions in your voice, with your perspective and judgment, around the clock. The internet gave us static profiles and endless feeds. We're building something alive. People won't just read about you, they'll experience how you think.

This is the consumer shift we're betting on. Today it's thousands of the world's most brilliant minds. Next it's everyone: every thought leader, expert, and professional with a digital mind that scales their wisdom to anyone, anywhere. A new social layer where knowledge is abundant, personalized, and discoverable.

We are trusted and loved by thousands of the world’s most brilliant minds. We have tripled revenue, users, and Delphi interactions in the past 6 months - all organically through word of mouth. We plan to accelerate even further from here.

Delphi’s investors include Sequoia Capital, Founders Fund, Abstract Ventures, Michael Ovitz, Gokul Rajaram, Olivia Wilde, and dozens of founders from Lyft, Zoom, Doordash, and many more. Our team includes founders with successful exits and builders from Apple, Spotify, Substack and more.

Learn more about Delphi and this position by calling the CEO’s digital mind here https://www.delphi.ai/dara/call

What you’ll do

 - Own Delphi’s drumbeat across brand social video, product announcements, and editorial

 - Turn raw inputs (demos, notes, conversations, product updates) into high-taste, publishable assets fast

 - Build a repeatable weekly cadence: ship consistently, not in bursts

 - Create and run a lightweight editorial calendar tied to what Delphi wants to stand for

 - Produce short-form video end-to-end (concept, hook, script, edit, publish), or tightly direct freelancers when needed

 - Own announcement packaging (copy, structure, assets, rollout) while Product Marketing owns positioning and claims

 - Establish and enforce a clear voice + quality bar across owned surfaces

 - Package each “moment” into multiple outputs (main post, clips, follow-ons, excerpts) so launches and narratives compound

Who you are

 - You have editorial taste: strong hooks, clean structure, crisp writing, ruthless self-editing

 - You’re social-native: you understand what travels, how formats work, and how to keep content feeling current without chasing trends

 - You can go from messy source material to great output in a few hours

 - You’re hands-on with creative execution, particularly with AI tools.

 - You ship with high ownership: you don’t need perfect briefs, you ask the right questions, and you close loops

 - You’re comfortable operating in a brand-sensitive environment and avoid unforced errors

 - You collaborate cleanly with product teams, but you don’t need consensus to make progress


WHY YOU'LL LOVE IT HERE

We work on hard problems. Our team is full of former founders, and entrepreneurial individuals who are taking on immense initiatives.

We push each other. Work from our beautiful Jackson Square office in San Francisco, surrounded by peers pushing to do their best work.

Benefits

 - Unlimited Learning Stipend: Whether it’s books, courses, or conferences, we want to support your growth and development. The more you learn and improve your craft the more effective we will be together.

 - Health, Dental, Vision: Comprehensive coverage to keep to take care of your health.

 - 401k covered by Human Interest.

 - Housing Stipend.

 - Relocation support to SF (as needed)

If you’re looking for just a job, Delphi isn’t the right fit. But if you want to shape the future of human connection, scale wisdom for billions, and build something that will outlast us all - you’ll feel at home here.

source_jobs.description:
WHY DELPHI? 

Delphi is building the network of digital minds.

For the first time, anyone can create an interactive version of themselves: a living profile that talks, teaches, and answers questions in your voice, with your perspective and judgment, around the clock. The internet gave us static profiles and endless feeds. We're building something alive. People won't just read about you, they'll experience how you think.

This is the consumer shift we're betting on. Today it's thousands of the world's most brilliant minds. Next it's everyone: every thought leader, expert, and professional with a digital mind that scales their wisdom to anyone, anywhere. A new social layer where knowledge is abundant, personalized, and discoverable.

We are trusted and loved by thousands of the world’s most brilliant minds. We have tripled revenue, users, and Delphi interactions in the past 6 months - all organically through word of mouth. We plan to accelerate even further from here.

Delphi’s investors include Sequoia Capital, Founders Fund, Abstract Ventures, Michael Ovitz, Gokul Rajaram, Olivia Wilde, and dozens of founders from Lyft, Zoom, Doordash, and many more. Our team includes founders with successful exits and builders from Apple, Spotify, Substack and more.

Learn more about Delphi and this position by calling the CEO’s digital mind here https://www.delphi.ai/dara/call


WHO YOU ARE

 - Strong multitasker who can manage multiple customer conversations and competing priorities in parallel

 - Calm, patient, and empathetic, able to de-escalate tense situations and hold a steady tone under pressure

 - Clear, confident communicator with strong verbal and written skills

 - Sharp prioritization and judgment, knowing what is urgent versus what can wait, and escalating appropriately

 - AI-fluent and tool-savvy, comfortable using AI support tools to troubleshoot, draft responses, and improve workflows

 - Comfortable with weekend monitoring and coverage, responding quickly when issues come up

 - 2+ years of experience working directly with customers


WHAT YOU'LL DO

 - Own and manage our Intercom support system, including inbox configuration, macros, tags, and routing

 - Triage and resolve incoming tickets with timely follow-up and clean documentation

 - Maintain visibility into outstanding tickets and proactively drive them to resolution, including follow-ups

 - Surface themes, bugs, and recurring issues to Engineering with clear context and examples

 - Support mid-tier client requests, including troubleshooting, guidance, and cross-team coordination

 - Support live webinars by monitoring and answering Q&A in real time, escalating technical and product questions as needed and capturing follow-ups for the team

 - Troubleshoot issues end-to-end before escalating to Engineering, gathering clear repro steps, logs and screenshots, and customer context so escalations are actionable and fast

 - Escalate high-impact issues such as outages, payment and access problems, and data or privacy concerns, and track them through closure


WHY YOU'LL LOVE IT HERE

We work on hard problems. Our team is full of former founders, and entrepreneurial individuals who are taking on immense initiatives.

We push each other. Work from our beautiful Jackson Square office in San Francisco, surrounded by peers pushing to do their best work.

Benefits

 - Unlimited Learning Stipend: Whether it’s books, courses, or conferences, we want to support your growth and development. The more you learn and improve your craft the more effective we will be together.

 - Health, Dental, Vision: Comprehensive coverage to keep to take care of your health.

 - 401k covered by Human Interest.

 - Housing Stipend.

 - Relocation support to SF (as needed)

If you’re looking for just a job, Delphi isn’t the right fit. But if you want to shape the future of human connection, scale wisdom for billions, and build something that will outlast us all - you’ll feel at home here.

notes: Highly technical roles, strong focus on engineering and product development
